title: Chomsky Hierarchy of Formal Grammars and Languages
description: A flowchart illustrating the containment relationships between the four types of formal grammars (Type-0 to Type-3) in the Chomsky Hierarchy, their corresponding automata, and the language classes they define.
relationships: Type-3 is a subset of Type-2
Type-2 is a subset of Type-1
Type-1 is a subset of Type-0
